name: Keep it shut
short_description: Welcome to “Keep it Shut” — a first-person horror game. Game is intended to play with a microphone. You have to stay as quiet as possible and find all notes to beat the game. If you will scream - you lose.
detailed_description:
Welcome to “Keep it Shut” — a first-person horror game.
Imagine finding yourself in a sinister forest where every rustle sounds like a harbinger of danger, and the shadows seem full of hidden malice.
“Keep it Shut” is not just a game; it’s a truly immersive experience that makes your heart race and sends chills down your spine!

From the very first moment, you are enveloped in an atmosphere filled with eerie sounds and stunning graphics that draw you into a world of anxiety and darkness.
The forest, teeming with mysterious monsters, becomes the stage for your boldest adventures.
You will explore its uncharted corners, where every decision you make could be crucial!

Features:

Creepy atmosphere
Monsters in the woods
Note collection
Immersive graphics

“Keep it Shut” offers a unique experience full of thrills, dangers, and mysteries.
If you’re ready to face your fears and explore this eerie forest, then dive into this hardcore horror world!
Uncover the secrets, stay alert, and maybe you will survive!
